ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Al molto mag. M. Camillo Vezzato. amico nostro car.mo et hon.mo
ItacWorkItem.Content: Letter to Mr Vezzato in Antwerp, inviting him to join the Academy on request of Federico Badoer
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The letter si signed by Domenico Venier, Andrea Zorzi, Antonio Girardi, Zuane Badoero, Camillo Besalio, Alvise Badoer, and Vincenzo Alessandri.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
